author: y4rr
content: ADR delivered. Proposes two helpers in new ferrotorch-core/src/cast.rs: cast<T: NumCast>(x: f64) -> FerrotorchResult<T> and to_f64<T: ToPrimitive>(v: T) -> FerrotorchResult<f64>, both reusing FerrotorchError::InvalidArgument (NO new variant — avoids §4 coordination). Re-exported at crate root. Grep-validated ~985 site total, ~845 actual migration sites. Worked example: ferrotorch-distributions/src/normal.rs. Key insight: hot-path inner-loop functions (lgamma_scalar, digamma_scalar in special_fns.rs) should KEEP T::from(literal).expect('invariant: …') instead of migrating, because cascading Result through their signatures would force ~15 distribution functions to all become Result-returning. 4 open questions for user: (1) hot-path signature policy, (2) to_f64 vs to_t generalization, (3) prelude placement, (4) type_name() vs custom dtype_name() in error messages. No applied edits.
